The Israel Defense Forces reported that during the night, Hezbollah fired several rockets toward Haifa and northern Israel. Hezbollah initiated the attack and chose to engage in this conflict, and will pay a heavy price for it. In response to the attack, the Israeli army launched extensive strikes against Hezbollah terrorist targets throughout Lebanon, including in Beirut. We targeted dozens of headquarters, launch sites, and senior commanders. We also issued evacuation warnings for over fifty villages in Lebanon where Hezbollah terrorist infrastructure is located, which we will target later. Hezbollah has once again chosen the Iranian regime over the people of Lebanon.

Kuwait Army General Staff Head Quarters: The official spokesperson for the Ministry of Defense announced that several US warplanes crashed this morning, confirming that all crew members survived. He explained that the relevant authorities immediately initiated search and rescue procedures, evacuating the crews and transporting them to the hospital for medical evaluation and treatment. He noted that their condition is stable. The spokesperson added that coordination is underway with friendly US forces regarding the circumstances of the incident, and joint technical procedures are being implemented. He affirmed that the relevant authorities are continuing their investigations to determine the cause of the crash, urging the public to obtain information from official sources
